name: Ragequitmon
description: Born from the first controller ever thrown across a room. Its body is cracked plastic and wounded pride. It has rage-quit 4,847 battles and counts every single one as a win because it LEFT first. It lives in online lobbies and disappears the moment it starts losing. Has a mic but only uses it to breathe heavily and say 'this game is trash' before disconnecting. Its win rate is technically 100% because it does not acknowledge losses as real events that occurred.

moves.name: 💦 Sweat Protocol
moves.desc: Opens with the most tryhard combo in existence. Deals massive early damage because Ragequitmon goes absolutely all-in from turn one or not at all.

moves.name: 🎙️ Mic Spam
moves.desc: Breathes heavily into the mic, calls the opponent a noob, and lists their rank. Lowers opponent's defense as second-hand embarrassment sets in.

moves.name: 🚫 Lag Excuse
moves.desc: Claims the last hit didn't count because of lag. ATK sharply rises because Ragequitmon has convinced itself completely and fully of this.

moves.name: 🔁 Rematch Spam
moves.desc: Sends the rematch request 11 times in a row. Speed sharply lowers the opponent's as the notification spam makes it impossible to focus.

moves.name: 🎮 Mid-Air Recovery
moves.desc: Throws its own controller in fury then catches it at the last second. Restores 25 HP from the adrenaline of almost destroying a $70 peripheral.

moves.name: 🔌 Rage Quit
moves.desc: Unplugs the router at the exact moment it's about to lose. The opponent is poisoned by the denied victory AND confused because Ragequitmon is already back in a new lobby claiming it won.
